emails.subject: RE: HEART WALK
emails.body: RE: HEART WALK Leesa, I would like an extra large t-shirt. Mary Fischer To: Doyle, Debbie; Eldridge, David; Fischer, Mary; Gardner, Wayne; Gartner, Julie S.; Glod, Annette; Jones, Shelly; Kimball, Mary; pamela landry

emails.subject: RE: HEART WALK
emails.body: Mary, We didn't talk since the Race for the Cure, but I'm sure you heard it was cancelled. Boy, am I glad we didn't get up! Leesa To: White, Leesa

emails.subject: RE: HEART WALK
emails.body: I want you to know that I really enjoyed sleeping in especially when I heard the rain. I kept thinking I could be out there but I'm so happy I'm not. To: Fischer, Mary
